title: Latam Economy
description: Simple economy, not farmable and with many latam currencies.
body:
This mod adds currencies to make a simply economy from latinoamerica countries.

(Make sure to install both on client and server) _**[Apply To All Versions]**_
 
install the [Polymorph](https://modrinth.com/mod/polymorph) Mod it will make things easier

## Content:
-1.16.5, 1.17.1, 1.18.2 & 1.19.2

 Until now, (Beta v0.2)

- Includes all actual mexican currencies from 1 mexican peso coin up to 1000 pesos bill.
- A Wallet to store your money
